productName: fire bros silver Live Resin Lemon Slushee - 1g
description: A flavor-forward hybrid live resin, made from fresh-frozen Lemon Slushee in a closed-loop system so the dab tastes almost exactly like the plant smelled in the field. Saucy, vibrant, and intensely aromatic — a bright, zesty lemon flavor, with a balanced head-and-body experience.
